description.ko: 심해의 미답지 영역을 항해하며 극한의 압력을 견딜 수 있도록 설계된 최첨단 심해 탐사선입니다.
description.en: A cutting-edge deep-sea exploration vessel designed to withstand extreme pressures while navigating the uncharted territories of the abyss.

prompt: Cinematic shot of a high-tech futuristic submersible named AQUA-5 exploring a dark, bioluminescent deep ocean trench, glowing neon flora, mysterious giant sea creatures in the background, underwater bubbles, volumetric lighting, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, deep blue and turquoise color palette.
